description: Address code review issues: prompt injection sanitization, debounce queue instead of last-write-wins, action button no-ops, notification socket auth failure handling, calendar reportAction timing, stale reportAction closures in tasks page.
steps: Fix prompt injection in backend /api/context-suggest: Separate user data from instructions using system/user message roles or structural sanitization. Strip instruction-boundary characters from action_data and context.
Fix debounce dropping actions: Replace last-write-wins pendingActionRef with a queue that batches all actions within the 500ms window and sends them together.
Fix action button no-ops: Either remove action buttons from banner/toast or make them clearly dismiss-only with honest label text (e.g., 'Dismiss' or 'Got it' instead of misleading 'Reschedule').
Fix notification socket auth failure: Detect auth error messages in onmessage handler and trigger reconnection with fresh token.
Fix calendar reportAction timing: Move reportAction call after successful API response in handleCreateEvent.
Fix stale reportAction closures: Move reportAction calls outside setTasks updater in handleToggleTask and handleDeleteTask.
acceptance_criteria: Backend context-suggest endpoint sanitizes user data to mitigate prompt injection
AIContextProvider debounce uses a queue/batch approach instead of last-write-wins
Action buttons in banner and toast either dismiss honestly or are suppressed
Notification socket detects auth failure and retries with fresh token
Calendar page calls reportAction after successful event creation API call
Tasks page reportAction calls are outside setTasks updater callbacks
